description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the nixos/nix:latest Docker image and defines a single deploy stage with a pages job. The pages job runs in the deploy stage, executes the script lines: '# Build Snowflake.', then (cd tool && nix-build), '# Build site.', then (cd site && ../tool/result/snowflake build site), '# Install site.', then mkdir public and cp site/result/* public. It publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and only runs on the master branch.
